_description: Ready-to-import format for batch updating Notion database
_instructions: Fill in the data and use with tools/utility/batch-update.js

properties.Key People:
CEO: Jane Smith (https://linkedin.com/in/janesmith)
CTO: John Doe (https://linkedin.com/in/johndoe)
Founders: Jane Smith, Bob Johnson
properties.Focus & Notes: Series A: $10M (2023) | Total raised: $15M | 87 employees | AI Focus: Computer Vision, NLP for healthcare
properties.Short Blurb: AI company developing computer vision solutions for healthcare diagnostics. Founded in 2018, raised $15M Series A in 2023.

properties.Key People: [Text: Role: Name (LinkedIn URL) separated by newlines]
properties.Focus & Notes: [Text: Funding | Employee count | Other key facts]
properties.AI Focus Areas: [Array of strings: List of AI focus areas]

_notes: Only include properties you want to update
Size field must match exact select options
BC Region must match exact select options
AI Focus Areas should be an array of strings
Dates should be in Year Founded as numbers (e.g., 2018)
Keep entries under 2000 characters for rich text fields
